message: I want music that I haven't heard before that aligns with my taste.
I need music to fall asleep to that is calming and relaxing.
Let's get some music that I've never heard before. It doesn't have to be too niche.
Can you play soothing guitar music that I don't have in my library?
I really like Malcolm Todd right now, so if you could curate some songs that are by him and that sound similar to what he makes, that would be awesome.
